response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'Carbonated Love'. The video begins with a lengthy dialogue segment which was transcribed directly from the audio and on-screen cues. The song 'Carbonated Love' features on-screen lyrics which were used to supplement the provided JSON reference, especially for the second verse. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveforms.
